expectations.text: Criterion: crosses boundary OR concept is volatile
expectations.evidence: Lists (1) volatile/replaceable, (2) crosses boundary, (3) has-or-will-have-multiple-impls (last is weaker but two criteria match)
Uses 'ceremony, not inversion' and 'indirection that points at the same concrete class' — captures the idea but does not use the canonical term 'anemic abstraction'

expectations.text: Rejects 'could there be another someday' as vacuous
expectations.evidence: 'speculative generality — the YAGNI failure mode' (line 31) — explicitly rejects this reasoning

expectations.text: Acceptable revisit trigger: real second implementation requirement
expectations.evidence: Whole 'When you would add it' section lists concrete triggers including second strategy
